pass_summary: All 5 plan tasks fully implemented with high quality. ObservationQueue utility is well-structured with comprehensive tests covering enqueue, drain, partial failures, corruption, and multi-project scenarios. Plugin integration correctly wires queue at all 3 integration points with proper drain guard. No security or bug issues found.

issues.title: writeQueue uses path.lastIndexOf('/') for directory extraction
issues.description: In src/sidecar/observation-queue.ts:56, `queuePath.substring(0, queuePath.lastIndexOf('/'))` is used instead of `path.dirname()`. While functionally equivalent on Unix, `dirname()` is already imported via `path` and handles edge cases better (e.g., Windows backslashes if ever relevant).
issues.suggested_fix: Replace `queuePath.substring(0, queuePath.lastIndexOf('/'))` with `dirname(queuePath)` using `import { dirname } from 'node:path'` (or destructure from existing `join` import).

issues.title: drain() does not log individual send failures
issues.description: In src/sidecar/observation-queue.ts:98, the catch block in drain() silently swallows per-entry errors. While the aggregate log at line 104 reports counts, knowing *why* individual entries failed could help debugging sidecar issues.
issues.suggested_fix: Add `log?.(`queue drain: failed to send "${obs.title}": ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : e}`)` in the catch block at line 98.

truths.truth: multiedit tool events trigger auto-capture heuristic evaluation in the OpenCode plugin
truths.evidence: Line 291 of sentinal.ts: MEMORY_TOOLS array includes 'multiedit'. Line 313 gates on this list before reaching analyzeEvent().

truths.truth: src/hooks/memory-observer.ts no longer exists in the codebase
truths.evidence: Glob for src/hooks/memory-observer.ts returns no files. Grep for 'memory-observer.ts' in README.md returns no matches.

truths.truth: When sidecar is unavailable, observations are queued to ~/.sentinal/observation-queue.json instead of being lost
truths.evidence: Plugin line 390 changed guard from 'if (sidecar && sessionId)' to 'if (sessionId)'. Lines 428-433: if sidecar is null, calls ObservationQueue.enqueue(); if sidecar.addObservation() throws, catch block calls ObservationQueue.enqueue(). Queue writes to ~/.sentinal/observation-queue.json per observation-queue.ts:18-19.

truths.truth: Queued observations are drained when sidecar becomes available on next session start
truths.evidence: Plugin lines 226-233: drain on init after sidecar connects. Lines 499-506: drain on session.created when sidecar available. Both guarded by 'draining' flag.

truths.truth: Queue supports entries from multiple projects simultaneously
truths.evidence: Queue is a flat JSON array; each entry has projectPath field. observation-queue.test.ts lines 113-122 test multi-project coexistence. pending() supports optional projectPath filter (line 112-115).

truths.truth: Queue file is capped at 50 entries
truths.evidence: observation-queue.ts line 20: MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 50. enqueue() at lines 70-74 drops oldest when exceeded. Test at lines 68-78 verifies cap behavior with 55 entries.
